i just dont remember how does it matter for ultra who acts first
the first command card each turn is copied into ultra zone. Then when ultra zone is full, you get an extra turn with those exact 5 cards
some effects let you put more

for caro you can do uvash, and faint or uvash and aigis. 

For ultra you can do jenkins and winkle, and or tinct winkle and two other dps.

for caro you can directly use the embryo card to charge exalt and get temp crit
